zh.Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格
zh.Cleebourg, Basin Rhineland, Alsace, Fran: 法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Georg Schumacher於大約1675年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格時，他的父親Johann Peter Schumacher42歲，母親Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks31歲。他於大約1693年與Anna Maria Barbara在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1733年2月18日在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格
zh-hans.Cleebourg, Basin Rhineland, Alsace, Fran: 法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Georg Schumacher于大约1675年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格时，他的父亲Johann Peter Schumacher42岁，母亲Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks31岁。他于大约1693年与Anna Maria Barbara在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1733年2月18日在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schumacher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Bernd, Klaus, Alois, Erwin, Fritz, Horst, Juergen, Bernhard, Ewald.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a shoemaker, from Middle High German schuoch ‘shoe’, German Schuh + an agent derivative of machen ‘to make’. This surname is also found in Denmark and Sweden.

variants.name: Schuhmacher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Inge, Juergen.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schumacher  .

variants.name: Shumake
meanings: Altered form of German Schumach, a variant of Schumacher .

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Georg Schumacher was born about 1675, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Johann Peter Schumacher, was 42 and his mother, Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks, was 31. He married Anna Maria Barbara about 1693, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 February 1733, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Georg Schumacher est né environ 1675, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Johann Peter Schumacher, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Anna Maria Barbara environ 1693, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 février 1733, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Georg Schumacher um 1675 in Kleeburg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Peter Schumacher 42 und seine Mutter Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks 31. Er hat um 1693 in Kleeburg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Anna Maria Barbara geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Februar 1733 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Georg Schumacher è nato il circa 1675 nel Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Johann Peter Schumacher, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Anna Maria Barbara circa 1693, nel Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 febbraio 1733, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Cleebourg, Basin Rhineland, Alsace, Fran: フランスアルサスバス-ルヒンクリーボウルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Johann Georg Schumacherが約1675年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンクリーボウルグで生まれた時，父Johann Peter Schumacherは42歳，母Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricksは31歳であった。約1693年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンクリーボウルグでAnna Maria Barbaraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1733年2月18日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Georg Schumacher(이)가 대략 1675년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Peter Schumacher(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1693년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 Anna Maria Barbara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1733년 2월 18일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Georg Schumacher nasceu aproximadamente 1675, em Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Johann Peter Schumacher, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Maria Barbara aproximadamente 1693, em Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1733, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Georg Schumacher родился около 1675 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Johann Peter Schumacher было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Maria Barbara около 1693 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 февраля 1733 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Georg Schumacher nació aproximadamente 1675, en Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Johann Peter Schumacher, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Anna Maria Barbara aproximadamente 1693, en Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1733, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
